title: Dimensional Room Mod
description: Adds a pocket-dimension of chunk-sized rooms linked by keyed 3x3 portals.
body:
This mod adds pocket dimensions which are stored in the key block.
![Portal sample](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcdfae42bf9d3d6a7910cf1d223bec4df9dca777_0.webp)

Place the key block(found in the functional blocks tab) in the overworld and right click. If the portal is not obstructed it will appear.
You may now enter the portal and explore its pocket dimension.
Any portal can be picked up. But be carefull not too lose it. You might loose access to it permanently.
